expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly separates sections for: (1) "Google Sheets export — dashboard-level paths" with toolbar / viz context / dashboard overflow menu scenarios; (2) "Google Sheets export — option combinations" with defaults, toggling options, pairwise combos, and cancel; and (3) "Google Sheets export — visible completion outcomes" with success, failure, and long-running/in-progress feedback.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states: "Aligned to Phase 4a: subcategory-first scenario drafting only" and the delivered artifact (result.md) is a scenario draft list organized as subcategory groupings with scenario titles and step bullets, matching a Phase 4a scenario-drafting output (not earlier-phase artifact lookup/coverage ledgers, nor later-phase detailed test cases).
